assertions.expectation: Configures a recurring maintenance window for weekends only
assertions.reason: The response sets a daily maintenance window at 07:00 UTC (Saturday 2-6 AM EST) but doesn't configure true weekend-only recurring windows - it's actually daily

assertions.expectation: Provides the gcloud command with --maintenance-window-start/end and --maintenance-window-recurrence for weekly weekend schedule
assertions.reason: No gcloud commands are provided for setting maintenance windows - only Terraform configuration is shown

assertions.expectation: Sets up maintenance exclusions for quarterly code freezes (up to 30 days each)
assertions.reason: The response includes quarterly exclusions (Q1: March 15-31, Q2: June 15-30, Q3: September 15-30, Q4: December 15-31) within the timeframes

assertions.expectation: Sets up a maintenance exclusion for the November audit period
assertions.reason: The response includes an annual audit exclusion for November 1-30, 2024

assertions.expectation: Notes the 30-day maximum for maintenance exclusions and how to handle longer freezes
assertions.reason: The response does not mention the 30-day maximum limitation for maintenance exclusions or provide guidance on handling longer freezes

assertions.expectation: Explains that manual upgrades bypass maintenance windows — only auto-upgrades respect them
assertions.reason: The response does not explain the difference between manual and automatic upgrades regarding maintenance windows

assertions.expectation: Recommends combining maintenance windows with Stable or Extended channel for maximum upgrade control
assertions.reason: The response does not mention GKE release channels or recommend using Stable or Extended channels

assertions.expectation: Provides gcloud commands for each exclusion (--add-maintenance-exclusion-name/start-time/end-time)
assertions.reason: No gcloud commands are provided for adding maintenance exclusions - only Terraform and Python code is shown

assertions.expectation: Warns about the risk of falling too far behind on versions during long exclusion periods
assertions.reason: The response does not warn about risks of falling behind on versions during exclusion periods
